title: BriefLink Account Brief Artifact
description: Canonical MVP 1 schema for the generated brief artifact returned by GET /api/v1/status when processing is completed.

account_brief.description: Generated account summary for seller preparation.

risk_flags.description: Known risks, caveats, or unresolved uncertainties surfaced during generation.

prep_notes.description: Suggested preparation notes or discovery prompts for the seller.

$comment: Locked MVP 1 unknowns: output length targets, ordering guarantees, confidence scoring, citations, and source provenance are intentionally unspecified and not represented here.
